title: assignment-and-auto-response-rules-designer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the assignment-and-auto-response-rules-designer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

object_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Lead` or `Case` Required column: 'yes'.

routing_summary.description: Example from AGENT.md: "US Leads from Web route to Inside Sales by state; enterprise Leads (>$1M segment) to AE queue; all others to nurture" Required column: 'design'.
routing_summary.example: "US Leads from Web route to Inside Sales by state; enterprise Leads (>$1M segment) to AE queue; all others to nurture"

response_summary.description: Example from AGENT.md: "Web leads get templated thanks email; enterprise leads get tailored template with sales rep intro" Required column: 'design'.
response_summary.example: "Web leads get templated thanks email; enterprise leads get tailored template with sales rep intro"

evaluation_pattern.description: Example from AGENT.md: `first-match` (default) | `all-matches` (rare; typically only applies to Case sharing patterns, not ownership) Required column: 'design'.

audit_scope.description: Example from AGENT.md: defaults to the object's entire rule set Required column: 'audit'.
audit_scope.example: defaults to the object's entire rule set
